query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "in-context world modeling for robotic control" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on deep reinforcement learning (Soft Actor-Critic) for human-robot collaboration in real-world settings, which is a distinct mechanism and methodology from the user's specific question regarding "In-Context World Modeling" (a technique typically associated with Transformer-based LLMs and context-window reasoning).
